title: nervilia macrophylla
intro: Nervilia macrophylla, also known as the large leaf nervilia or the big leaf nervilia, is a type of orchid native to Asia and Australia. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Nervilia macrophylla include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Nervilia macrophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
